auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.
auth.name: Name
auth.checkEmailVerify: Check your email to verify your account.

validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.typeToSearch: Type to search across all notes.

panelEmpty.openNoteOutline: Open a note to see its outline
panelEmpty.openNoteBacklinks: Open a note to see backlinks
panelEmpty.openNoteProperties: Open a note to see properties
panelEmpty.openNoteComments: Open a note to see comments

settings.title: Settings
settings.noPermission: You do not have permission to access workspace settings.

search.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for "{query}"

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved.
errors.reportBrokenLink: If you followed a link to get here, please {link}.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Your workspace data is safe.
errors.criticalErrorDescription: Notesaner encountered a critical error and could not load. Your data is safe on disk.
errors.moduleCrashDescription: This section crashed but the rest of your workspace is still available.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.description: Notesaner requires an internet connection to sync your notes. Your local changes will be saved when you reconnect.
offline.banner: You are offline. Changes will sync when reconnected.
offline.checkNetwork: Check your network connection and try again.

api.networkError: Unable to connect to server. Please try again.
api.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
api.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
api.serverError: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
api.validationError: The submitted data is invalid. Please check your input.
api.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
api.conflict: A conflict occurred. Someone else may have modified this resource.
